noServersMessage: No MCP servers configured. Add one to extend agent capabilities.
connectorDescription: Custom actions (APIs, databases, etc.) bound to this agent. Managed on the Connectors page.
mcpServersLinkDescription: Tools provided by external MCP servers. Configure them on the Connectors page.
toolsFound: {count, plural, one {# tool} other {# tools}} found
deleteMcpServerDescription: This MCP server will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.
addMcpServerDescription: Configure a new MCP server connection.
activeToggleDescription: Enable this server for agent tool usage
discardUnsavedDescription: You have unsaved changes. Closing will discard them.
keyRequiredWarning: Configure keys to use this tool
myKeysDialogDescription: Enter your personal credentials for this MCP server. These are used instead of the shared server credentials.

Filesystem.desc: Read and write local files with configurable allowed directories.
Filesystem.config: Replace /tmp with your allowed directory path

Git.desc: Inspect repository history, diffs, branches and file contents via Git.

SQLite.desc: Query and modify SQLite databases with full SQL support.

PostgreSQL.desc: Read-only SQL access to a PostgreSQL database.

Puppeteer.desc: Browser automation — navigate pages, take screenshots, interact with elements.

Playwright.desc: Fast and reliable browser automation with Microsoft Playwright.

Fetch.desc: Fetch any web page and convert it to Markdown — no API key needed.

Brave Search.desc: Web and local search via the Brave Search API.
Brave Search.config: Get key at brave.com/search/api → paste into BRAVE_API_KEY

Exa Search.desc: Semantic AI-first search and content retrieval via the Exa API.
Exa Search.config: Get key at dashboard.exa.ai → paste into EXA_API_KEY

Memory.desc: Persistent knowledge graph memory for agents across conversations.

Sequential Thinking.desc: Structured step-by-step reasoning tool for complex problem solving.

Notion.desc: Official Notion MCP — read and write pages, databases, and blocks.
Notion.config: Get key at notion.so/my-integrations → set OPENAPI_MCP_HEADERS to: {"Authorization":"Bearer YOUR_KEY"}

GitHub.desc: Manage repositories, issues, pull requests and code via GitHub API.
GitHub.config: Create token at github.com/settings/tokens → paste into GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN

GitLab.desc: Interact with GitLab repositories, issues and merge requests.
GitLab.config: Create token at gitlab.com/-/user_settings/personal_access_tokens · set GITLAB_URL to your GitLab host

Everything (test).desc: Official MCP test server covering all tool types — great for verifying setup.

Slack.desc: Read and post messages, manage channels in your Slack workspace.
Slack.config: Create bot at api.slack.com/apps → paste Bot Token; find Team ID in workspace URL

Google Drive.desc: Search and access files in Google Drive.

Google Maps.desc: Location search, directions, and place details via Google Maps.
Google Maps.config: Enable Maps API at console.cloud.google.com → paste into GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY
